name: Dynatrace MCP Server (Official)
what_it_does: Official Dynatrace MCP server enabling AI agents to interact with Dynatrace's AI-powered observability platform — querying metrics, problems, events, logs, and leveraging Davis AI insights for automated anomaly analysis.
use_cases: Querying Dynatrace problems and root cause analysis from incident agents
Accessing Davis AI anomaly detection insights for automated triage
Querying application and infrastructure metrics via DQL from agents
Reading Dynatrace log data for incident investigation
Checking synthetic monitoring test results from reliability agents
not_for: Teams using New Relic, Datadog, or other APM tools
Small teams not needing enterprise-grade AI observability
Open source alternative seekers (Dynatrace is proprietary/premium)
best_when: An agent needs enterprise-grade observability with AI-driven root cause analysis — Dynatrace's Davis AI provides automated anomaly detection and causality.
avoid_when: You're using Datadog, New Relic, or another APM platform — use those integrations.

auth.notes: API tokens with fine-grained permission scopes. OAuth 2.0 for platform automation. Token scopes control exactly which API endpoints are accessible.

pricing.notes: Premium enterprise pricing. No free tier. Dynatrace is one of the more expensive APM solutions.

performance.rate_limits: API rate limits vary by endpoint; well-documented per API type

known_agent_gotchas: Dynatrace environment ID required for all API calls — unique per tenant
DQL (Dynatrace Query Language) for metrics — different from Prometheus or NRQL
Managed vs SaaS deployments have different API endpoints
Davis AI problem IDs are volatile — use time range queries for persistent monitoring
Token scopes are granular but must be explicitly granted — easy to miss required scopes
Grail (new data lake) vs classic Dynatrace have different APIs
agent_readiness.security_notes: HTTPS enforced. API tokens with fine-grained scopes are excellent. OAuth 2.0 available. FedRAMP, SOC 2, ISO 27001, HIPAA, PCI DSS. Enterprise-grade security.

security_score_components.security_notes: HTTPS enforced. Fine-grained API token scopes are best-in-class. FedRAMP, SOC 2, ISO 27001, HIPAA, PCI DSS. Enterprise observability security gold standard.
